title: polygala geniculata
intro: Polygala geniculata, also known as knee-root or pink milkwort, is a flowering plant species in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is a perennial herb native to North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Polygala geniculata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
